title: selaginella tortipila
intro: Selaginella tortipila, a species of the Selaginella genus, is a type of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella tortipila include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Selaginella tortipila is often prepared as a tea or capsule, and it can also be ingested as a dietary supplement to harness its potential health benefits.
